background: A system is composed of three identical components, two of which are required to operate. The third is initially in standby. Assume that all components operate independently. If we assume perfect sensing and switching, that the active failure rate of each component is $\lambda$, and that the standby failure rate is zero.

task.query: Find the reliability of the system.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: Determine the MTTF of the system.
Calculate (a) and (b) when $\lambda=0.005$ per hour and t $=10 \mathrm{~h}$.
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
